problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
hypothesis: Combining Shape memory alloy phase transition with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
